## 2026-04-03 Session

### Prep

- [x] **Follow-through:** Laura presented Helix at the all-hands — went well
- [x] **Recent work:** Kickoff meeting today with Jake from VectorVendor
- [ ] **Career development:** Check in on research-track interest
- [ ] **Personal:** Check if she wants another direct connection to the broader data science community

### Notes

**Discussion:**
- Helix kickoff went well this morning. Laura asked the sharpest questions of the meeting.
- She mentioned having a PhD in applied stats — first time she's brought that up unprompted. That's a sign of growing comfort.
- Talked about what the spike outcome could look like: a recommendation, not a deliverable. She seemed relieved at that framing.
- Vendor pressure is already starting (Jake pushing on pricing). Agreed she'll push back on any pricing conversations until the technical eval is done.

**Action Items:**

- You to run interference with VectorVendor sales if they escalate
